title: lithocarpus hainanensis
intro: Lithocarpus hainanensis, also known as the Hainan Lithocarpus, is a species of tree in the beech family Fagaceae. It is native to Hainan Island in China and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is reported to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Lithocarpus hainanensis can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and optimal preparations.
